notes: Implemented inventory guided work for new customers – located in Quick Links!
Implemented "Log Maintenance" button on the Maintenance Due page.
Adjusted the inventory model popup to group fields into sections and refined structure/availability settings.
Implemented an "Include Hidden" filter to the search browser, allowing users to include or exclude hidden inventory items.
Implemented Welcome popup with Help Center search capability for Flex trial users.
Implemented a new global report named Non-Serialized Model Quantity Report.
Fix for an issue that caused addresses in Contact Manager to not export properly.
Internal version alignment.
Implemented ability to reopen recently closed tabs.
Implemented change in browser refresh to keep all open tabs after refresh.
Implemented “Workflow Usage” in Projects > Workflow.
Implemented “Go to Workflow Jobs” button in Projects > Workflow.
Implemented “Go to Workflow” button in Projects > Workflow Jobs.
Implemented “Workflow Job Usage” in Projects > Workflow Jobs.
Implemented a “Jobs” column in Projects > Workflow with hyperlinks to each job in the tooltip.
Fix for an issue that caused some workflow jobs to populate in inconsistent order.
Implemented the Top Maintenance Procedures maintenance logistics dashlet.
Implemented the Maintenance by Inventory Model maintenance logistics dashlet.
Adjusted the Dashboards “Inventory Group” filter to support multiple, or all, selections.
Fix for an issue that caused an error when selecting multiple options in “Group” column filter.
Fix for an issue that caused the start and end date Time value to not populate when element is closed or locked.
Implemented Maintenance Logistics tab on Dashboards page.
Implemented Maintenance Due in the Inventory Menu.
Implemented Maintenance History in the Inventory Menu.
Implemented OOC History in the Inventory Menu.
Implemented a Service Location field to maintenance log records (defaults to the last location it was journaled in to).
Adjusted the OOC Logistics dashlets to support interactivity, allowing you to click and explore detailed data.
Implemented new columns in the Scan History page – Group and Scan Source columns.
Implemented the OOC Logistics tab in Dashboards page.
Implemented the Scanning Logistics tab in Dashboards page.
Adjusted the Scan History grid permission to Can View Inventory.
Implemented Email Workflow Jobs API.
Implemented "Email Me…" API.
Implemented user invitation functionality (via User popup).
Implemented the ability to set a default Home view.
Implemented various help center links within the header of popups.
Implemented a file attachment field within Contact Flex Support form.
Implemented additional tooltips for fields within Element Definitions.
Adjusted the fields within the New/Edit User popup and added collapsible sections.
Removed the Help option from the Main Menu (now located within the Resource Browser).
Implemented new functionality that allows Admin users to create new corporate identities.
Implemented the ability to edit Quick Links (available for System Admins).
Implemented the ability to mark multiple lines as presumed missing or manually returned in the Past Due tab.
Implemented a Contact Flex Support form in-app under the ? icon.
Implemented a search bar within Element Definitions.
Implemented the ability for users to upload an icon from the Element Definitions Icon field.
Adjusted the Past Due "Due Back" filter default to "Last 30 Days".
Implemented new Flex Add-Ons link to the ? icon for awareness of additional Flex features.
Implemented an interactive text editor for Terms and Conditions.
Implemented the ability to select all permissions within a section.
Implemented a search field to the Permissions popup.
Implemented tooltips across Element Definitions on General Settings, Numbering, and Dates & Times tabs.
Adjusted Help sections, streamlining information by moving links down from the Main Menu to the ? icon in the bottom left.
Fix for an issue where manually adjusting on-hand quantity to "0" did not save.
Removed the ability to sort columns within the Scan Log page.
Implemented a link to the Status Page in the Help menu.
Adjusted the Past Due tab to not include lines with an "Outgoing" resource type (ie Retail).
Implemented a "…" menu in the Past Due tab.
Adjusted the name of "Sensitive Field Types" to "Sensitive Search Fields."
Fix for an issue that did not allow deleting phone numbers in business locations.
Implemented the ability to delete a Scheduled Inventory Count that is in progress.
Implemented a search field within the Main Menu.
Fix for an issue that caused an error when executing a workflow action with an executor group set.
announcement: Click here to register for our UK Power User Session in London! (August 30)

notes: Adjusted various grids to allow selecting checkboxes across multiple pages.
Fix for various issues when exporting the Contact Manager.
Implemented a "Reply To" and "From Address Name" field in Email Workflow Jobs.
Implemented a tooltip for truncated column names in grids.
Implemented an RFID Tag column in the Inventory Manager when "include serial units" is selected.
Fix for an issue that caused the inventory tree to become inactive after rearranging items and folders.
announcement: Click here to register for our User Training in Las Vegas! (June 10-11)

notes: Adjusted the name of the workflow action's Confirm Screen Enabled popup.
Fix for an issue in Safari that caused text areas to populate as the wrong size.
announcement: Click here to register for our User Training in Las Vegas! (June 10-11)

notes: Implemented the "option list" custom field in the Calendar list view.
Adjusted the Assets Receipt report to include non-serialized inventory models.
Fix for an issue that displayed OOC units in original location after being transferred.
Implemented the ability to drag and drop from the Inventory/Search Browser to scanning screen.
Implemented Tags for contacts and companies.
Fix for an issue that did not provide the "Generate Report" option on the reports menu.
Fix for an issue that caused an error after a browser refresh.
Implemented Single Sender Email to meet new email requirements from Google & Yahoo.
Fix for an issue that did not allow deleting lines off of File Lists (i.e. Documents).
Fix for an issue that allowed users to see the Inventory Browser icon when Can View Inventory permission is denied.
Moved the inventory model Audit Trail page to the Can Manage Inventory permission.
Fix for an issue that caused the Business Location field type to populate the old name after being adjusted.
Implemented format mask options to Field Types in "email" Workflow Jobs.
Adjusted the behavior after a Status Option is created to auto-launch the Configure Element's popup.
Fix for an issue that did not allow deleting of a workflow state.
Implemented the ability to set inventory models as expendable.
Implemented Forgot Password functionality.
Implemented the ability to drag and drop from the Recent History browser.
Adjusted the icon for services within the Services browser.
Fix for an issue that caused the model's size to not appear in recent history.
Fix for an issue that caused custom reports generated in EXCEL to not open.
Implemented Help > About Flex5 version popup.
Fix for an issue that allowed merging of companies into a contact.
Implemented an email preview for the "Email Notification w/Report" Workflow Job type.
Implemented Inventory > Scan History grid.
Fix for an issue that caused the inventory tree configuration page to become unresponsive after rearranging items.
Fix for an issue that did not allow child inventory groups to be deleted.
Implemented System Settings > Tags.
Implemented Tags for inventory models.
Implemented Tags column in inventory worksheet.
Implemented a warning prompt when adjusting the numbering sequence.
Implemented a Report Level option in custom report settings.
Fix for an issue that caused the Authorized Groups on custom reports to not save.
announcement: Click here to register for our UK User Training in London!

notes: Implemented a right-click menu on inventory models in the search browser.
Implemented a refresh icon in the inventory model's Quantity tab.
Adjusted the behavior when undeleting an inventory model to remove the DELETED suffix from the barcode.
Implemented Bin Locations in the Inventory Worksheet (as a View Option).
Implemented an "Undo" option in the deleted toaster for resources.
Implemented Microsoft Sign On as a login option on the landing page.
Implemented custom field "Options List" in search options.
Implemented the ability to set Field Settings as required.
Implemented System Settings > Images.
Implemented a link to the Flex Billing Portal in the Help menu.
Implemented the ability to clone element definitions.
Fix for an issue that allowed a user with the "can browse & search hidden items" permission denied to be able to view hidden items in the inventory manager.
Fix for an issue that caused the serial unit image to be cut off.
Fix for an issue that caused the "copy image link" to not display.
Implemented the ability to mark serial units as OOC in bulk (via the Serial Units tab of an inventory model).
Adjusted the corporate identity "parent entity" field to only allow one to be selected as "yes".
Fix for an issue that caused disabled automated functions to still send.
Fix for an issue that did not apply company information when editing a contact record.
Implemented System Settings > Backup History.
Implemented the "run custom report" settings within System Settings > Automated Functions.
Fix for an issue that allowed users to change password from the user profile menu when "can change password" was denied.
Fix for an issue that did not allow contact notes/tasks to be undeleted.
Implemented the ability to merge duplicate contacts.
Implemented the "Birthday" field for contacts.
Implemented Sign In with Google on the Renew Session screen.
Fix for an issue that caused the cogwheel to be present in unsupported areas of the resource browser.
Implemented the "clear" icon for element custom fields.
Implemented the "Currency Enabled" field in the General Settings tab.
Fix for an issue that caused edited chained child actions to be removed from workflow actions.
Fix for an issue that did not allow values to be saved in authorized groups within the custom report popup.
Fix for an issue that did not support the "None" option in the change to type and chained parent action fields within the workflow action popup.
Implemented the "Copy Whole Tree" option in the Create Copy popup.
Implemented the "ASSIGNED" special code in email workflow jobs.
Implemented the BCC field within the Email Notification w/Report workflow job.
Fix for an issue that caused a new Security Group to not save.
Implemented Projects > Workflow Jobs.
Fix for an issue that caused Aggregation reports to not load in the Reports menu.
Adjusted the "Send Feedback" button to direct users to the Help Center.
Implemented Element Definitions > Search Options.
Implemented Google Sign-In as a login option on the landing page.
Fix for an issue that caused values to not save in the edit popup when viewing the details of a workflow.
Implemented Element Definitions > Custom Fields tab.
Implemented Projects > Workflow.
Implemented Contacts > Contact Types.
Implemented the ability to add and edit Cheat Sheets.
Implemented the ability to mark element Custom Fields as required.
Implemented Element Definitions > Contact Associations, Security, and Dates & Times tabs.
Implemented the Audit Trail for inventory models and serial units.
Implemented System Settings > Report Groups.
Implemented "Configure Report Groups" option in the Reports menu.
Implemented adding and editing Static Reports in the Reports menu.
Implemented adding and editing Custom Reports in the Reports menu.
Implemented the "Configure Parameters" option within Custom Reports "..." menu.
Implemented the "Show Only" filter within the Reports menu.
Implemented Element Definitions > Status Options, Child Elements, and Report tabs.
Implemented System Settings > Sound Themes.
Implemented Projects > Element Definitions.
Implemented Element Definitions > General Settings, Field Settings, and Numbering tabs.
Implemented Report Preferences on the Reports menu.
Implemented the ability to download report codes on the Reports menu.
Implemented System Settings > Sound Clips.
Implemented the Assigned Number field for contacts.
Restricted the ability to enter "<" or ">" within the inventory group Name field.
Adjusted the "Include" filter option in the Serial Units tab of an inventory model.
Implemented System Settings > Units of Measure.
Implemented Inventory > Inventory Settings.
Implemented System Settings > Numbering Schemes.
Implemented the "Background" and "Text" color selector in element's new/edit popup.
Adjusted the "Due Back" date to highlight in red when the date is in the past.
Adjusted the Inventory Dashboard for non-serialized items to not include Free Scan Out field.
Fix for an issue that caused the Inventory Dashboard to display OOC quantities in other location's "still out" calculation.
Fix for an issue that did not update the inventory model's "preset" when adjusting the structure fields.
Implemented "Inventory Count Groups" scanning functionality for Scheduled Inventory Counts.
Implemented the "Home Location Warning" when the scanning location does not match the unit's home base location.
Fix for an issue that caused the business location time to always display as "GMT (+0000)".
Adjusted the element’s "Notifications" tab and implemented the ability to mark notes as read/unread (previously the “Notes” tab).
Adjusted the Flex logo on the login and loading screens.
Implemented Inventory Worksheet (previously known as the Catalogue Worksheet).
Implemented System Settings > Status Options.
Fix for an issue that caused problems when exporting pages.
Implemented System Settings > Departments.
Implemented the "Locked" column on the System Settings > Users screen.
Fix for an issue that caused the "Clear All Filters" option to not clear all fields on various grid pages.
Fix for an issue that caused contact "Notes" to appear in the To-Do List when "Show for All Users" was checked.
Adjusted the serial unit details page to default to the "Scheduled Maintenance" tab, if applicable.
Implemented the Notes/Tasks tab within a contact.
Implemented the Flex5 workflow action engine.
Added an "All" option to the multi-selector filter in the inventory model's serial units tab.
Adjusted the scheduled inventory count Reconciliation page.
Adjusted the scheduled inventory count Scanning page.
Implemented Scheduled Inventory Counts.
Implemented a multi-selector filter in the inventory model's "serial units" tab.
Implemented the ability to configure custom field groups.
Fix for an issue that caused field names to not populate within popups.
Implemented Maintenance History tab within contacts.
Implemented the ability to open the company contact when viewing an individual contact.
Renamed the "Reported By" field to "Responsible Party" in the new maintenance log popup.
Fix for an issue that caused undeleted units to be marked as deleted after outbound scan.
Implemented the "Past Due" widget (located on the Home tab).
Adjusted the default tab when opening up a contact record (the default will be Assets tab).
Adjusted the contact's Assets tab to filter out Deleted, Decommissioned, and Sold assets.
Adjusted the "Is Company" field when creating a New Company (while creating a New Contact).
Fix for an issue that caused an error message when deleting the contact's barcode.
Fix for an issue that prevented the ability to set a Due Date after scanning an asset to a contact.
Fix for an issue that did not properly log IP Addresses or Logouts in the User Access History.
Fix for an issue that only allowed 50 icons per category to populate when adding an icon to an inventory model or group.
Implemented Contact Manager (within the Contacts menu).
Implemented the ability to download .CFG files.
Implemented the "Scan History" tab within a contact record.
Implemented automated barcode generation for "Contact" resource types and Facilites.
Implemented Custom Field "Option List" type management.
Implemented System Settings > Custom Fields configuration page.
Fix for an issue that caused color codes to not be present on deleted contacts or models within the Search menu.
Implemented the Inventory Dashboard.
Implemented the Resource Types page (listed under System Settings).
Improved the new contact "company" field search results.
Implemented the ability to bulk return assets in the Scan to Contact screen.
Implemented the "Include Deleted/Closed" option within the Search menu.
Implemented the ability to Export list pages.
Implemented the ability to upload a logo to Corporate Identities.
Fix for an issue that caused the UI to crash after deleting an image from a copied inventory model.
Implemented the ability to undelete inventory models and serial units from the Inventory Manager page.
Implemented the ability to select and copy error message details.
Fix for an issue that caused a login error when user's default location got deleted.
Relocated the "Send Feedback" button to the Resource Browser (above the Profile icon).
Implemented a tooltip in the Resource Browser when text is too long.
Implemented the Flex5 search engine.
Fix for an issue that caused data to not update when changing the calendar template.
Fix for an issue that caused User to Contact relationships to not sync correctly.
Implemented right-click quantity availability within the Inventory Tree.
Implemented "enter" key mapping to close prompts in scanning screens.
Implemented the business location drop-down menu (located in the header).
Fix for an issue that did not accept email format within the new contact/company popup window.
Fix for an issue that caused the location "pencil" on scanning screens to not be present when the location name is over 23 characters.
Implemented the "Asset Receipt" report.
Implemented the ability to mark non-serialized quantities as OOC.
Implemented the copy, edit, and delete modify options in task element definitions.
Implemented "Enter key mapped to OK button" checkbox when creating or editing new inventory models and serial units.
Fix for an issue that caused inventory, contact, and business location images to appear condensed.
Fix for an issue where you couldn't update or edit an existing inventory model image.
Fix for an issue where you couldn't move inventory models to the very bottom of an inventory group in the inventory group configuration page.
Fix for an issue where dragging and dropping a model from a child inventory group to a parent inventory group caused a UI glitch.
Fix for an issue that caused bulk deleting maintenance logs to not work as expected.
Improved spacing and scrolling on grids with many columns.
Fix for an issue where deleted maintenance procedures were showing when creating a maintenance log.
Fix for an issue that showed contacts, maintenance procedures, locations, and other non-inventory in the Inventory Manager.
Implemented double-click on an inventory group to collapse it.
Implemented the Files tab on contact pages.
Implemented the Files tab on serial unit pages.
Implemented the Files tab on inventory model pages.
Fix for an issue that caused non-serialized quantities to revert to previous numbers after saving.
Fix for an issue that caused the Scheduled Maintenance tab to show on non-serialized models.
Fix for an issue that allowed for duplicate users to be created.
Fix for an issue that prevented the "Can View Tasks for All Users" option from showing for some users.
Fix for an issue that caused a UI glitch in the inventory tree after adding "Additional Groups" to inventory.
Fix for an issue where the Time and Frequency settings of a scheduled maintenance entry were not saving.
Fix for an issue that caused a spinning wheel when attempting to log in as a user who does not have the Authenticated User permission granted.
Implemented the To-Do List.
Implemented the "Asset Register" report.
Implemented the "Asset Assignment Register" report.
Implemented the Scheduled Maintenance feature.
Implemented a new "Quick Links" tab on the Home page, with quick links to commonly used features and functionality.
Removed irrelevant main menu options.
Fix for an issue that prevented an inventory group from being deleted.
Implemented the Scan to Contact feature.
